name: useAtomInitialValues
description:
Seeds initial atom values in the current React atom registry.

**Details**

Each atom is initialized at most once for a given registry, so subsequent
renders do not overwrite values that have already been established.
signature: declare const useAtomInitialValues: (initialValues: Iterable<readonly [Atom.Atom<any>, any]>) => void

name: useAtomValue
description:
Subscribes to an atom in the current React registry and returns its current
value, optionally mapped through a selector.
signature: declare const useAtomValue: { <A>(atom: Atom.Atom<A>): A; <A, B>(atom: Atom.Atom<A>, f: (_: A) => B): B; }

name: useAtomMount
description:
Mounts an atom in the current React registry for the lifetime of the
component.
signature: declare const useAtomMount: <A>(atom: Atom.Atom<A>) => void

name: useAtomSet
description: Mounts a writable atom and returns a setter without subscribing to its value.
signature: declare const useAtomSet: <R, W, Mode extends "value" | "promise" | "promiseExit" = never>(atom: Atom.Writable<R, W>, options?: { readonly mode?: ([R] extends [AsyncResult.AsyncResult<any, any>] ? Mode : "value") | undefined; }) => "promise" extends Mode ? ((value: W) => Promise<AsyncResult.AsyncResult.Success<R>>) : "promiseExit" extends Mode ? ((value: W) => Promise<Exit.Exit<AsyncResult.AsyncResult.Success<R>, AsyncResult.AsyncResult.Failure<R>>>) : ((value: W | ((value: R) => W)) => void)

name: useAtomRefresh
description:
Mounts an atom and returns a callback that refreshes it in the current React
registry.
signature: declare const useAtomRefresh: <A>(atom: Atom.Atom<A>) => () => void

name: useAtom
description:
Subscribes to a writable atom and returns its current value together with a
setter for updating it.
signature: declare const useAtom: <R, W, const Mode extends "value" | "promise" | "promiseExit" = never>(atom: Atom.Writable<R, W>, options?: { readonly mode?: ([R] extends [AsyncResult.AsyncResult<any, any>] ? Mode : "value") | undefined; }) => readonly [value: R, write: "promise" extends Mode ? ((value: W) => Promise<AsyncResult.AsyncResult.Success<R>>) : "promiseExit" extends Mode ? ((value: W) => Promise<Exit.Exit<AsyncResult.AsyncResult.Success<R>, AsyncResult.AsyncResult.Failure<R>>>) : ((value: W | ((value: R) => W)) => void)]

name: useAtomSuspense
description:
Reads an `AsyncResult` atom through React Suspense, suspending while the
result is initial or configured as waiting.
signature: declare const useAtomSuspense: <A, E, const IncludeFailure extends boolean = false>(atom: Atom.Atom<AsyncResult.AsyncResult<A, E>>, options?: { readonly suspendOnWaiting?: boolean | undefined; readonly includeFailure?: IncludeFailure | undefined; }) => AsyncResult.Success<A, E> | (IncludeFailure extends true ? AsyncResult.Failure<A, E> : never)

name: useAtomSubscribe
description:
Subscribes a callback to an atom in the current React registry for the
component lifetime.
signature: declare const useAtomSubscribe: <A>(atom: Atom.Atom<A>, f: (_: A) => void, options?: { readonly immediate?: boolean; }) => void

name: useAtomRef
description: Subscribes to an atom ref and returns its latest value.
signature: declare const useAtomRef: <A>(ref: AtomRef.ReadonlyRef<A>) => A

name: useAtomRefProp
description: Returns a memoized atom ref for a property of another atom ref.
signature: declare const useAtomRefProp: <A, K extends keyof A>(ref: AtomRef.AtomRef<A>, prop: K) => AtomRef.AtomRef<A[K]>

name: useAtomRefPropValue
description:
Subscribes to a property ref derived from an atom ref and returns its current
value.
signature: declare const useAtomRefPropValue: <A, K extends keyof A>(ref: AtomRef.AtomRef<A>, prop: K) => A[K]

name: "./Hooks.ts"
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./Hooks.ts" module.
signature: export * from "./Hooks.ts"

name: "./RegistryContext.ts"
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./RegistryContext.ts" module.
signature: export * from "./RegistryContext.ts"

name: "./ReactHydration.ts"
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./ReactHydration.ts" module.
signature: export * from "./ReactHydration.ts"

name: "./ScopedAtom.ts"
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./ScopedAtom.ts" module.
signature: export * from "./ScopedAtom.ts"

name: HydrationBoundary
description:
Hydrates dehydrated Atom values into the current Atom registry for a React
subtree.

New Atom values are hydrated during render so descendants can read them
immediately, while values for existing Atoms are deferred until after commit
so transition data does not update the current UI before React accepts it.
signature: declare const HydrationBoundary: React.FC<HydrationBoundaryProps>

name: HydrationBoundaryProps
description:
Props for a boundary that applies dehydrated Atom values to the nearest
{@link RegistryContext} while rendering its children.

name: RegistryContext
description:
React context that supplies the `AtomRegistry` used by Atom hooks and
hydration helpers, defaulting to a standalone registry when no provider is
present.
signature: declare const RegistryContext: React.Context<AtomRegistry.AtomRegistry>

name: scheduleTask
description:
Schedules Atom registry work with React's scheduler at low priority and
returns a cancellation function for the scheduled task.
signature: declare const scheduleTask: (f: () => void) => () => void

name: RegistryProvider
description:
Provides a stable `AtomRegistry` to a React subtree, optionally seeding
initial atom values and overriding registry scheduling or idle settings.
signature: declare const RegistryProvider: (options: { readonly children?: React.ReactNode | undefined; readonly initialValues?: Iterable<readonly [Atom.Atom<any>, any]> | undefined; readonly scheduleTask?: ((f: () => void) => () => void) | undefined; readonly timeoutResolution?: number | undefined; readonly defaultIdleTTL?: number | undefined; }) => React.FunctionComponentElement<React.ProviderProps<AtomRegistry.AtomRegistry>>

name: TypeId
description: Type identifier for ScopedAtom.
signature: declare const TypeId: "~@effect/atom-react/ScopedAtom"

name: make
signature: declare const make: <A extends Atom.Atom<any>, Input = never>(f: (() => A) | ((input: Input) => A)) => ScopedAtom<A, Input>

name: ScopedAtom
signature:
export interface ScopedAtom<A extends Atom.Atom<any>, Input = never> {
  readonly [TypeId]: TypeId
  use(): A
  Provider: [Input] extends [never] ? React.FC<{ readonly children?: React.ReactNode | undefined }>
    : React.FC<{ readonly children?: React.ReactNode | undefined; readonly value: Input }>
  Context: React.Context<A>
}

name: TypeId
description: Type identifier for ScopedAtom.
signature: type TypeId = "~@effect/atom-react/ScopedAtom"
